core_topic.definition: Reverse-engineered topical map of envira-gallery.com — the keyword and content territory they've claimed, intended to inform FooGallery's competitive content strategy.
core_topic.audience: Internal — FooPlugins content/SEO team. NOT for publication.

pillars.title: Envira Gallery (product hub)
pillars.rationale: Branded queries — they own these by definition. Not a contest. Noting them only to map the structure.

pages.title: Envira Gallery WooCommerce Add-on
pages.notes: DataForSEO shows they rank pos 3 for 'wordpress gallery woocommerce' (720 monthly volume). This is a direct attack surface — FooGallery should build a stronger WooCommerce integration landing page (already in this map as page-6 of the FooGallery commercial map).

pages.title: Envira Gallery Lightroom Add-on
pages.notes: Niche but they own it. Lightroom integration is a meaningful pro-photographer hook. Worth evaluating if FooGallery should build similar or compete differently.

pages.title: How to Create an Image Gallery in WordPress
pages.target_query: how to create image gallery wordpress
pages.notes: DataForSEO shows pos 2 for this term. Their highest-traffic tutorial. FooGallery's 'how to add image gallery' page (page-8 in commercial map) competes on a similar query — needs to be measurably better.

pages.title: How to Create a Responsive Image Gallery in WordPress
pages.notes: Pos 4 for the head term. Validates that this tutorial topic has traffic — corresponds to page-9 in the FooGallery commercial map.

pages.title: How to Add Lazy Loading to WordPress Images
pages.notes: Pos 6. Tangential to galleries specifically but they captured the broader image-handling traffic. Possible new page for FooGallery.

pages.title: Best WordPress Gallery Plugins (Envira's own listicle)
pages.notes: Pos 3. Self-listing themselves at #1 in their own listicle (as expected). FooGallery's competing listicle (page-3 in commercial map) needs to outrank this — fresher data, better UX, more honest tone.

rules: N/A — this is a competitor analysis map, not a build map. No internal linking recommendations apply.
